notes: B4G3-Submit order creates Draft order. Wizard completed, success notification shown, order created with Draft status.
B4G3-Success message 'ORD-016 created successfully' displayed after wizard submission.
B4G3-New order ORD-016 visible as first row in orders grid after creation. Pagination shows 16 total.
B4G3-Newly created order ORD-016 shows 'Draft' status badge on detail page.
B4G3-Full wizard flow as Admin: selected product, quantity, priority, due date, production line, submitted. Order ORD-016 created.
B4G3-Full wizard flow as Supervisor completed. ORD-017 created with Draft status. Previously FAIL, now PASS.
B4G3-Full wizard flow as Operator completed. ORD-019 created with Draft status via run-code. Previously FAIL, now PASS.
B4G3-Order detail displays all fields: Product, Quantity, Priority, Due Date, Assigned To, Production Line, Shift, Created. Activity Log section present.
B4G3-Operator sees Submit, Edit, Delete on Draft order detail — no Approve/Reject. Kanban cards also show no Approve/Reject buttons for Operator role.
B4G3-Product field shows 'Polymer Coating Mix' (resolved name), not raw productId.
B4G3-Assigned To shows '-' (dash for unassigned), not raw userId.
B4G3-Production Line shows 'Coating Station' (resolved name), not raw lineId.
B4G3-Clicked Edit on Draft order ORD-016, fields became editable: Product dropdown, Quantity spinbutton, Priority dropdown, Due Date textbox, Notes textbox, Save/Cancel buttons appeared.
B4G3-Supervisor sees Approve and Reject buttons on Submitted order detail page. Approved via button, verified card moved to Approved column on Kanban.
B4G3-Modified quantity from 100 to 250 on Draft order, saved. Reloaded page, quantity persisted as 250.
B4G3-Submitted order (ORD-018) has no Edit button — only transition action buttons available.
B4G3-In Production order (ORD-005) shows only 'Complete Production' button, no Edit option.
B4G3-Completed order (ORD-001) shows only navigation buttons (Logout, Back to Orders), no Edit or Delete.
B4G3-Clicked Delete on Draft order ORD-016, confirmation dialog appeared: 'Are you sure you want to delete order ORD-016? This action cannot be undone.' with Delete/Cancel buttons.
B4G3-Confirmed deletion of ORD-016, redirected to /orders, order no longer in grid.
B4G3-Cancelled deletion dialog, order ORD-016 still present on detail page.
B4G3-Completed order (ORD-001) and In Production order (ORD-005) have no Delete button — option hidden for non-Draft orders.
B4G3-Settings CRUD cycle test (TC123) is a Settings-domain test that falls outside TC101-TC125 scope. Marked SKIP for this batch.

B4G3-Created order ORD-023 with Copper Wire Harness/300qty. Edited to Steel Bracket A/999qty. Reloaded detail page confirmed changes persisted. Verified on Kanban (Draft column). Then deleted for cleanup.
B4G3-Orders grid shows 15 seed orders on base data. Total now higher due to test additions. Pagination 'Showing 1-10 of N' format correct.
